id.description: The unique ID of the password reset object.

user_id.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

expires_at.description: The timestamp when the password reset token expires.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the password reset token was created.

password_reset_token.description: The token used to reset the password.

password_reset_url.description: The URL where the user can reset their password.

code.description: The error code identifying the type of error.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
